seo_title: Spotify Now Lets You Clip Moments from Favorite Podcasts
meta_description: Discover how to clip favorite moments from podcasts on Spotify and share them with your audience.
body_html:
With the new scissors icon, you can clip favorite moments from podcasts and share them with your audience.

How to Use Spotify's New Podcast Clipping FeatureYou can access the clipping feature by clicking on the new scissors icon next to each podcast episode.The clipped moment will be saved as a separate audio file, allowing you to share it with others.Spotify also allows you to add notes and tags to your clips for easy organization.Benefits of Using Spotify's Podcast Clipping FeatureBenefitDescriptionTime-savingThe clipping feature allows you to quickly save and share favorite moments from podcasts, saving time for busy listeners.Improved engagementBy sharing clips with others, users can engage more deeply

with their favorite podcast episodes.Enhanced organizationThe ability to add notes and tags to clips helps users keep track of their favorite moments from podcasts.Technical DetailsSpotify's new podcast clipping feature uses advanced audio processing algorithms to ensure high-quality clip exports.

source.title: Spotify now lets you ‘clip’ moments from your favorite podcast
source.summary: Spotify has introduced a new feature that allows users to "clip" memorable moments from their favorite podcasts. This functionality is represented by a scissors icon, which enables users to extract and share specific parts of a podcast episode with others. The new feature aims to enhance user engagement and sharing experiences on the platform.
